data.name: Going Rogue
data.detailed_description:
Going Rogue is a Visual Novel style game focused on storytelling, realistic characters, a branching story with lots of choices, and of course, an excellent visual quality.

The game plot

The protagonist graduates from the police academy and, under the pressure of circumstances, is forced to agree to work undercover to infiltrate one of the gangs. You will have to make difficult decisions, which will determine the development of the plot and the lives of other characters. Kill an unarmed drug dealer to prove your reliability to the mafia? Leak information to the police at the risk of exposing yourself? Disappear from your ex-partner's life, or let her know you're okay?

And so you can relax between making tough decisions, there are three main romantic options in the game.

Zoe, your ex-partner.

You were just starting to get a connection when you had to go undercover. Of course, you couldn't tell her, and now she thinks you just disappeared. Will you meet again, and what will she think of you when she finds out you're in a gang now?

Miranda, the head of the organized crime unit and your boss.

She's beautiful, but the job comes first in her life. Will she always see you as a subordinate, or will there be more than that between you?

Grace, a woman with a brutal fate, is entangled in the web of the mafia.

Can you save her or is it too late?

What will be the answers to these questions? It's up to you.

  • More than 70000 words.

  • More than 3000 static pictures.

  • More than 100 animations.

  • 5-8 hours of gameplay.

data.short_description: Going Rogue is a Visual Novel style game focused on storytelling, realistic characters, a branching story with lots of choices, and of course, an excellent visual quality.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 義大利文, 德文, 波蘭文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: 2Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
